summary:
All tests pass. 

**The needle:** The bug was in `/app/app/CsvReader.java` where the charset was set to `ISO-8859-1` instead of `UTF-8`. The CSV file contains UTF-8 encoded international characters (like `RenĂ©e`, `MĂ¼ller`, `MarĂ­a`, `SĂ¸ren`, `FranĂ§ois`, `ZoltĂ¡n`, `MĂ¼nchen`, `KĂ¸benhavn`), but the reader was decoding them as ISO-8859-1, which corrupted all the non-ASCII characters. The fix was simply changing `Charset.forName("ISO-8859-1")` to `Charset.forName("UTF-8")`.
